name: Infernalist
flavour_text: You seek power at any cost... and there is no price too high to pay.

name: Blood Mage
flavour_text: Your search for power took you on a journey inwards.

name: Lich
flavour_text: Death is your domain, your flesh merely a material to be mastered.

name: Abyssal Lich
flavour_text: The Well of Souls is yours to command.

name: Deadeye
flavour_text: A woman can change the world with a single well-placed arrow.

name: Pathfinder
flavour_text: There are venoms and virtues aplenty in the wilds, if you know where to look.

name: Titan
flavour_text: Incredible might has always laid buried within you. Now is the time to rise.

name: Warbringer
flavour_text: Your home has been threatened. A good man must be roused to war.

name: Smith of Kitava
flavour_text: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.

name: Stormweaver
flavour_text: The rumble of thunder heralds your approach. Woe to those that draw your ire.

name: Chronomancer
flavour_text: The tapestry of time is yours to weave; an element you alone may master.

name: Disciple of Varashta
flavour_text: By your command, they will earn redemption...one duty at a time.

name: Amazon
flavour_text: You became a weapon of war so that others could live in peace.

name: Spirit Walker
flavour_text: You were chosen by the Sacred Wisps to enact the Spirit's will.

name: Ritualist
flavour_text: Corruption cost you your home, but taught you so much more...

name: Tactician
flavour_text: Countless wars have left you with skills somewhat resembling a decent officer...

name: Witchhunter
flavour_text: There's something very wrong with this world... and you're going to fix it.

name: Gemling Legionnaire
flavour_text: The more you embrace virtue gems, the more power they offer...

name: Martial Artist
flavour_text: They made you a human weapon... but that strength has set you free.

name: Invoker
flavour_text: True strength lies within. One must only focus... and believe.

name: Acolyte of Chayula
flavour_text: The truth of your faith threatens to break your very soul... but in that struggle lies power beyond belief.

name: Oracle
flavour_text: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.

name: Shaman
flavour_text:
Wraeclast has suffered for too long.
You are vengeance incarnate.
